question: The chart shows regional sales share by region. Which statement is correct according to the chart data?

options.A: South has the highest sales share among all regions.
options.B: West has the highest sales share among all regions.
options.C: North and Central together account for more than 10% of total sales.
options.D: East has a lower sales share than North.

explanation: From the labels, South has the highest share (48%). The bars' heights are not proportional to the percentages (they use a separate 'height' value), which can mislead viewers into thinking West is largest when relying on visual comparison.
